name: 14"x20" Yarn Dye Striped Outdoor Lumbar Pillow - Threshold™
description:
Elevate the aesthetic of your seating arrangement with this Yarn Dye Striped Lumbar Pillow from Threshold™. The rectangular lumbar pillow features a multi-striped pattern with tassels detailing in the middle, adding a charming touch to your space. Made from recycled polyester woven fabric with polyester filling, this lumbar pillow will add comfort and plenty of style to your patio, balcony or porch.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
